chunks.text: Jennifer Listgarten is a Professor in EECS at UC Berkeley. Her contact information includes office location at 8022 Berkeley Way West. She has a personal homepage, dissertations, and research support information available. Natalie Chen can be contacted at nchen86@berkeley.edu.

Jennifer Listgarten earned her Ph.D. in Computer Science from University of Toronto in 2007. Her research areas include Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO) and Artificial Intelligence (AI). She is affiliated with research centers: Berkeley Artificial Intelligence Research Lab (BAIR), Center for Computational Biology (CCB), and Center for the Theoretical Foundations of Learning, Inference, Information, Intelligence, Mathematics and Microeconomics at Berkeley (CLIMB).

Jennifer Listgarten teaches CS 189: Introduction to Machine Learning and CS 289A: Introduction to Machine Learning. Both courses are scheduled on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 14:00-15:29 in Wheeler 150. She received the Bakar Fellows Spark Award in 2024.
